description_long: This stadium features a low-profile, elliptical structure with a prominent, continuous roof canopy that appears to be supported by a series of slender columns. The exterior facade is composed of smooth, light-colored materials, with transparent or translucent panels forming the upper perimeter, likely providing natural light to the interior. The seating bowl is recessed into a broad, stepped base, suggesting a sunken field or arena at the center. The main entrances are integrated into the lower sections of the facade, with wide, open access points visible on the front and rear. The roof structure is visually distinct, with a greenish tint and a gentle curvature that unifies the design. Minimal external ornamentation and a focus on clean lines give the stadium a contemporary, functional appearance.
description: A modern, elliptical stadium with a continuous green-tinted roof canopy, smooth light facade, and recessed seating bowl. Wide entrances and transparent upper panels highlight its contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, wide and open, with the green-tinted roof canopy and stepped base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the stepped base and the structural supports for the roof, with some interior seating details visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the continuous roof and the symmetry of the facade, with another large entrance and the sunken seating bowl.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the same stepped base and roof supports, with additional details of the facade's smooth surface.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is smooth and streamlined, primarily composed of light gray concrete with large, transparent glass panels forming a continuous band near the roofline. The base is stepped and broad, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over ornamentation. The roof canopy is a distinctive green-tinted structure, gently curved and supported by slender columns, creating a unified and modern silhouette.
attribute_entrance_type: The primary entrances are wide, open gateways integrated into the lower facade, designed for high-capacity flow. There appear to be at least two main entrances, each lacking ornate features but emphasizing accessibility and scale.
